overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a fantasy RPG showing a cloaked character walking through a dim gothic cathedral interior, emerging into a dramatic exterior with a fiery red apocalyptic sky, and ascending a grand staircase toward a massive ornate cathedral structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral nave with golden drapery and candelabras

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit cathedral interior toward the illuminated archway exit

entered.detail: dramatic shaft of golden light descending from the ceiling oculus
heavy golden curtains hanging along the nave walls
tall multi-branched candle stands with lit flames
large stone doorway leading to the exterior
intricate carved stone patterns on the cathedral floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit gothic cathedral interior, illuminated by a dramatic golden light beam from above. Heavy golden drapery lines the walls alongside lit candelabras as the character approaches a distant stone archway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand exterior staircase leading to cathedral under fiery apocalyptic sky

events.description: character exits the cathedral interior through the archway into the open area with fiery red sky
character begins ascending the long grand staircase toward the cathedral entrance

agents.ego_description: emerging from the cathedral and climbing the grand stone staircase toward the massive central structure

entered.detail: colossal ornate cathedral structure with intricate stone carvings and spires
apocalyptic sky filled with swirling red flames and embers
wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading up to the cathedral
decorative carved stone balustrades lining both sides of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the cathedral into a dramatic exterior bathed in red light, revealing a massive gothic cathedral ahead against a fiery apocalyptic sky. The character begins ascending a grand stone staircase with ornate railings, moving toward the imposing structure as embers swirl in the air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim, opulent interior of a gothic cathedral into a vast, apocalyptic exterior. It begins with a cloaked character walking through a dimly lit hall, where heavy golden drapery and lit candelabras are illuminated by a single dramatic beam of light from above. As the character approaches a distant stone archway, the scene shifts from the golden interior to a dramatic outdoor landscape bathed in deep red light. The camera then follows the character as they emerge into the open air, revealing a fiery sky and a massive gothic structure ahead. Finally, the movement continues up a grand stone staircase with ornate railings, ascending toward the imposing cathedral while embers swirl through the air.
